title: ReceiptBoundary
description: Schema for a ReceiptBoundary — records scoped review state with accepted/denied/pending claim refs. Not absolute truth, not runtime proof, not security certification.

receipt_boundary_id.description: Unique identifier for this ReceiptBoundary record

response_packet_ref.description: Reference to the ResponsePacket this receipt covers

final_gate_advisory_ref.description: Reference to the FinalGateAdvisory for this response

accepted_claim_refs.description: References to claims accepted in scoped review (not absolute truth)

denied_claim_refs.description: References to claims denied in scoped review

pending_claim_refs.description: References to claims pending review or human decision

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence supporting this receipt boundary

review_refs.description: References to review records contributing to this boundary

is_absolute_truth.description: Must be false — receipt boundary is scoped review state, not absolute truth

is_runtime_proof.description: Must be false — receipt boundary is not runtime proof

is_security_certification.description: Must be false — receipt boundary is not security certification

is_deployment_proof.description: Must be false — receipt boundary is not deployment proof

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — what this receipt records and does not certify

candidate_only.description: Must be true — receipt boundary is scoped record, not app acceptance

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this receipt does not claim or prove
